faqData.question: 🕒 What time should I arrive?
faqData.answer: Please arrive at least 30 minutes before the ceremony to ensure everyone is seated on time.

faqData.question: 👗 What is the dress code?
faqData.answer:
Our theme is Cream and Soft Purple Garden Elegance. 💜

Guests are encouraged to wear:

Light, breathable fabrics
Shades of lavender, lilac, Cream, Off-white or Soft Purple.

To honor the bride, we kindly ask guests to refrain from wearing pure white or very dark colors. Gentle tones such as off-white or cream are warmly welcome.

faqData.question: 🌿 Is the venue indoor or outdoor?
faqData.answer: The ceremony will take place in a garden setting, followed by a reception in the same venue.

faqData.question: 🎁 Gift guide
faqData.answer:
Your presence is already a gift to us. 🤍

However, if you wish to bless us, a monetary gift would be truly appreciated as we begin our new journey together.

faqData.question: 👨‍👩‍👧 Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Due to limited seating, we can only accommodate guests listed on the invitation. Thank you for understanding. 💜

faqData.question: 👶 Can I bring my kids?
faqData.answer: As much as we love kids, only children who are part of the entourage are allowed.

faqData.question: ⏰ What time does the celebration end?
faqData.answer: The program is expected to end around 10:00 PM.
